title: Moss's DnD
description: RPG style modpack featuring create, valkyrien skies, paladins and priests, better combat, origins, and others.
body:
This modpack is meant to turn minecraft into the ultimate RPG experience. It includes but is not limited to:

- Origins and its addons so you can select an origin and a class
- Worldgen mods 
- Create and Valkyrien skies for more emersive builds and transportation
- Journeymap  and RPGHud for a more RPG feel
- Better combat, Archers, Paladins and Priests, and Wizards all to enhance combat
- Way too many structure mods
- Adventurez, Mythic Mounts, Mythic Mobs, Creeper Overhaul, and a couple others
- Various performance, atmoshpere, and equipment mods. Lots of small tweaks

Go check out Moss's DnD 2! It's better!
